mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_order_extra_template (group_id, code, name, version, schema_json, enabled) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{version}, #{schemaJson}::jsonb, #{enabled})
mapper.update: UPDATE wms_order_extra_template SET name = #{name}, schema_json = #{schemaJson}::jsonb, version = #{version}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND group_id = #{groupId}
UPDATE wms_order_extra_template SET enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND code = #{code}
mapper.select: SELECT id, group_id, code, name, version, schema_json::text AS schema_json, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM wms_order_extra_template WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND code = #{code}

SELECT id, group_id, code, name, version, schema_json::text AS schema_json, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM wms_order_extra_template WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND code = #{code} AND enabled = TRUE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_order_extra (group_id, order_id, template_id, template_code, template_name, template_version, payload) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{orderId}, #{templateId}, #{templateCode}, #{templateName}, #{templateVersion}, #{payload}::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (group_id, order_id, template_code) DO UPDATE SET template_id = EXCLUDED.template_id, template_name = EXCLUDED.template_name, template_version = EXCLUDED.template_version, payload = EXCLUDED.payload, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT id, group_id, order_id, template_id, template_code, template_name, template_version, payload::text AS payload, created_at, updated_at FROM wms_order_extra WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id

SELECT id, group_id, order_id, template_id, template_code, template_name, template_version, payload::text AS payload, created_at, updated_at FROM wms_order_extra WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND order_id = #{orderId} AND template_code = #{templateCode}
